description: AWS provider fields that cause post-import diffs. Each field includes metadata describing exactly what the provider does with the value on create, update, and delete.

not_read.description: Read doesn't populate this field. Import has null. Diff is null → value. Root cause depends on where the value comes from.

root_causes.bridge_default: Field has a TF SDK Default. Bridge applies it during PlanResourceChange on null import state. Program doesn't set it. Issue: https://github.com/pulumi/pulumi-terraform-bridge/issues/2436
root_causes.aws_api_limitation: AWS API does not return this data. Program must provide the value explicitly.
root_causes.provider_design: AWS API returns this data but provider Read doesn't populate it in state. Program must provide the value explicitly.

_field_schema.default: TF SDK schema default applied when program doesn't set the field
_field_schema.read_from_aws: Whether any AWS API returns this value (false for all not_read fields)
_field_schema.sent_to_aws_on_create: Whether provider sends this to an AWS API during Create
_field_schema.sent_to_aws_on_update: Whether provider sends this to an AWS API during Update (true | false | conditional)
_field_schema.sent_to_aws_on_delete: Whether provider sends this to an AWS API during Delete
_field_schema.provider_side_effect: Provider behavior that doesn't involve an AWS API call (e.g. polling, waiting)
_field_schema.triggers_api: If the field conditionally triggers a separate AWS API call, which API and under what conditions

verify.check_tf_code: Whether to verify the default/value matches TF code
verify.check_tf_state: Whether to verify against tf-digest (TF state persists this value from initial create)
verify.check_aws: Whether to verify against deployed AWS resource via CLI
verify.aws_cli: AWS CLI command to check the deployed value (when check_aws is true)
verify.note: Additional verification guidance when direct check is not possible

read_filtered.description: Read populates but filters results. Import has partial data.

provider_normalized.description: Read populates but normalizes format. Import has different structure, same semantics.

typeset_ordering.description: Read populates but bridge compares positionally. Import has different order, same values.
typeset_ordering.note: Resolves after first pulumi up. Only recurs on pulumi refresh.

computed_cascade.description: Output changes because an upstream field changed. Not directly settable.

default_tags_migration.description: TF default_tags writes to explicit tags; Pulumi defaultTags writes to tagsAll. No tag lost.
default_tags_migration.note: Applies to ANY resource type. Detected by field name (tags/tagsAll), not per-type.

waitForSteadyState.provider_side_effect: When true, provider polls ECS until service reaches steady state after create/update. Blocks until stable.
waitForSteadyState.note: No AWS API call. Controls how long the provider waits before returning.

computed_cascade.taskDefinition: Includes revision number which changes on any task def update

revokeRulesOnDelete.note: Revokes all ingress/egress rules before deleting the SG. No effect on create or update.

forceDestroy.note: Forces object version deletion. No effect on create or update.

acl.note: provider_design — GetObjectAcl API returns ACL but provider Read doesn't fetch it. PutObjectAcl called on update.

content.note: provider_design — GetObject API returns content but provider Read doesn't fetch it. PutObject called on update.

source.note: provider_design — local file path, not an AWS field. Contents uploaded via PutObject.

computed_cascade.versionId: S3 creates new version on PutObject, cascades from content/source

secretString.note: provider_design — GetSecretValue API returns the value but provider Read doesn't populate it. PutSecretValue called on update.

parameters.note: read_filtered — Read filters by Source=parameterSourceUser, discarding system defaults. Digest has the TF state value with snake_case keys (apply_method) which get camelCased (applyMethod) by the patcher.

applyImmediately.note: Sent to ModifyDBInstance. false = changes deferred to maintenance window.

forceDestroy.note: Forces instance deletion. No effect on create or update.
Empties bucket (deletes all objects and versions) before bucket deletion. No effect on create or update.

typeset_ordering.rules: schema.TypeSet in TF provider. Bridge #3324 — deeply nested blocks fail element matching

forceOverwriteReplicaSecret.triggers_api: Only sent when replica regions are being added. No effect on update without replica changes.
forceOverwriteReplicaSecret.note: Controls whether to overwrite a secret with the same name in a replica region.

recoveryWindowInDays.note: Sent as RecoveryWindowInDays to DeleteSecret API. DescribeSecret does not return it. Value persists in TF state from initial create.

certificateBody.note: provider_design — GetCertificate API returns cert body but provider Read doesn't fetch it. ImportCertificate called on update.

certificateChain.note: provider_design — GetCertificate API returns cert chain but provider Read doesn't fetch it. ImportCertificate called on update.

privateKey.note: aws_api_limitation — private keys never returned by any AWS API. ImportCertificate called on update.

verify.note: AWS never returns private keys. Trust config secret from tf-digest.

confirmationTimeoutInMinutes.provider_side_effect: Controls how long provider waits for subscription confirmation during creation.
confirmationTimeoutInMinutes.note: No AWS API parameter. Provider-side timeout only. No effect on update or delete.

endpointAutoConfirms.provider_side_effect: Controls whether provider auto-confirms subscription during creation.
endpointAutoConfirms.note: No AWS API parameter. Provider-side behavior only. No effect on update or delete.

applyImmediately.note: Sent as ApplyImmediately param to ModifyDBCluster on every update. false = changes deferred to maintenance window. Affects ALL future Pulumi updates to this cluster.

enableGlobalWriteForwarding.note: Sent to ModifyDBCluster. false = disabled. Safe if global write forwarding is not currently enabled.

enableLocalWriteForwarding.note: Sent to ModifyDBCluster. false = disabled. Safe if local write forwarding is not currently enabled.

masterPassword.note: aws_api_limitation — DescribeDBClusters never returns passwords. ModifyDBCluster called with password on update. Verify config secret matches deployed before applying.

verify.note: AWS never returns passwords. Trust config secret from tf-digest.

publish.triggers_api: When true AND code or config also changes, calls PublishVersion to create a new Lambda version. Changes qualifiedArn, qualifiedInvokeArn, version outputs.
publish.note: Setting false after import is safe — no version published. Setting true only publishes if code/config also changes in the same update.

code.note: aws_api_limitation — GetFunction returns presigned download URL, not package content. UpdateFunctionCode called on update. Verify deployed code matches program before applying.

verify.aws_cli: lambda get-function --function-name NAME (download from Code.Location URL)

computed_cascade.qualifiedArn: Changes when new version published (from code + publish)
computed_cascade.qualifiedInvokeArn: Changes when new version published (from code + publish)
computed_cascade.lastModified: Timestamp updated on any function change
computed_cascade.version: Increments when new version published (from code + publish)

provider_normalized.defaultActions: AWS normalizes targetGroupArn into forward block with stickiness.duration=0

skipDestroy.note: When true, skips DeregisterTaskDefinition on delete. No effect on create or update.
